title: Grove Artifact Metadata
description: Content-addressed artifact metadata. Describes an opaque blob stored in the Grove CAS (Content-Addressable Storage). Artifacts are immutable and globally deduplicated — the same content always produces the same content_hash. The artifact name is not part of this schema; naming is the contribution's responsibility (via the artifacts map key).

content_hash.description: BLAKE3 content hash of the artifact bytes. This is both the unique identifier and the integrity check for the blob.

size_bytes.description: Size of the artifact in bytes. Recorded at ingest time to avoid CAS round-trips for size queries.

media_type.description: IANA media type of the artifact content (e.g., 'application/json', 'text/plain', 'application/octet-stream'). Implementations SHOULD infer this from the source filename extension when available and SHOULD normalize to lowercase. When the type cannot be determined, implementations MAY omit this field or use 'application/octet-stream'. Parameters (e.g., '; charset=utf-8') are not permitted — use the base type only.
